text.title: go-error-handling Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from apperror scaffold to lint-gated CI.

step.name: scaffold-apperror-pkg
step.action: Drop templates/apperror.go into pkg/apperror/. Implement Error(), Unwrap(), constructors (NewNotFound, NewBadRequest, NewConflict, NewInternal), Wrap.
step.decision-gate: If team prefers internal/ over pkg/, place there — but apperror is intentionally exportable.

step.name: define-wrap-rules
step.input: List of layers (handler, service, repository) + their typical errors.
step.action: Document the wrap rule per boundary: repository wraps with `%w` and maps driver errors; service wraps with `%w` and adds context; handler returns error (no wrap).
step.decision-gate: If a layer has no useful context to add, do not wrap — just `return err`.

step.name: repository-boundary-mapping
step.input: Driver list (pgx, sql, redis, http client).
step.action: For each driver, write a mapping function in internal/repository/errors.go: pgx.ErrNoRows -> NewNotFound; uniqueness-violation -> NewConflict; etc.
step.output: One mapping function per driver in repository/errors.go.
step.decision-gate: If the driver does not expose stable sentinel errors (custom RPC client), prefer matching on code strings, document the choice.

step.name: wire-middleware
step.action: Drop templates/error-middleware.go into internal/middleware/. Register in order: RequestID, Recovery, Logger, ErrorMapper.
step.decision-gate: Recovery MUST come before ErrorMapper. If order is reversed, panics produce blank 500s.

step.name: lint-gate
step.action: Enable errorlint, wrapcheck, errcheck, nilnil. Run on PR.
step.decision-gate: Block merge on any linter finding from this set.
